---
title: "The Rev. Henry Walter Brock"
---

## The Rev. Henry Walter Brock

**Dates:** (17 May 1849-Oct 1919)

### Description

Vicar of Otterbourne 1881-1892

### Biography

He married (3 Jan 1882) Amy Gabrielle Powell (d. 10 Feb 1947). He served as vicar of Otterbourne from 1881, resigned 1892 and until his death was Rector of St Pierre-du-Bois, Guernsey (succeeding his father, the Very Rev Carey Brock, 1824-1892, dean of Guernsey). [<i>John Keble’s Parishes</i>; LG 1952 Brock]

### Letters

- Letter from 7 June 1892
- Letter from April 27 [1892[[footnote:1]]].
- Letter from October 10, 1891[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 17th 1888
- Letter from St. Michael [29 September 1887]
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Decr 8th [1883]
- Letter from Sept  3d [1881]
- Letter from July 2, 1881.
- Letter from April 23d [1881]
- Letter from Jany 3d 1881 [1882]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
